title: Tick Control in Franklin Square | Long Island Tick Removal | $125-$325

intro: Franklin Square residents face increasing tick populations due to the area's mix of residential yards, parks, and proximity to green spaces. Our professional tick control services protect Franklin Square families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses year-round. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick treatments tailored to Franklin Square's unique suburban landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and Long Island communities for years with proven tick elimination methods and family-safe treatments. Our licensed technicians understand Franklin Square's specific tick challenges and deliver fast, effective solutions with transparent pricing from $125-$325.
localContext: Franklin Square's tree-lined streets, backyard spaces near Rath Park, and residential properties close to wooded areas create ideal tick habitats. The village's well-maintained lawns and proximity to neighboring green spaces in Garden City and Elmont require specialized tick prevention to keep families safe during outdoor activities.

faqs.question: What does tick control service include in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Our Franklin Square tick control service includes a thorough property inspection, targeted perimeter treatment of your yard, lawn spraying focusing on tick hot spots like wooded edges and tall grass areas, and follow-up prevention recommendations. We use EPA-approved products safe for families and pets while effectively eliminating ticks at all life stages.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Franklin Square, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Franklin Square typically runs from April through November, with peak activity in May through July and again in October. However, ticks can be active year-round during mild Long Island winters. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining quarterly services throughout the warm months for maximum protection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide tick control service in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day tick control services for Franklin Square residents in most cases. Our local Long Island technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to address urgent tick problems. Treatment takes 30-60 minutes depending on property size, and your yard is safe for use within 2-4 hours after application.

faqs.question: What's included in the $125-$325 pricing for Franklin Square tick control?
faqs.answer: Our pricing varies based on property size and treatment frequency. The $125-$325 range covers properties from small yards up to larger Franklin Square residential lots. This includes complete yard inspection, professional-grade tick spray application, treatment of high-risk areas, and a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. We provide free quotes and can customize treatment plans for your specific property needs.
